dialog.busy.warning: Please do not close the app; this window will disappear automatically when the task is done.
dialog.close.title: Close OwO! Win Deployer
dialog.close.q: Exit the app, or minimize it to keep running in the background?
dialog.close.desc: “Keep running in the background” collapses the window to the system tray and keeps the app running; click the tray icon to reopen it.
dialog.close.remember: Remember my choice (can be changed in Settings)
dialog.devmode.title: Enable developer mode
dialog.devmode.bannerTitle: Developer mode unlocks advanced system features
dialog.devmode.bannerBody: These features can directly modify system settings, manage processes and startup items; improper use may cause system instability or data loss. Please confirm you understand the risks.
dialog.devmode.feat1: The full software list (dev toolchains, IDE, AI, databases — all categories)
dialog.devmode.feat2: Terminal · Service Config · FTP Transfer · WSL · System Tweaks · Advanced Tools
dialog.devmode.feat3: Maintenance · Process management · Startup items · Environment variable editing
dialog.devmode.footer: This setting can be turned off any time under Settings → Developer Options.
